titleStmt.title: SII 18.120: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 120. (B.K. No. 22 of 1933-34.) KĀGINELLI, HIREKERUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the temple of Kallēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva, is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 47 Śubhakṛit, Chaitra Pūrṇimā, lunar eclipse, Monday. But for the week-day, the details correspond to A.D. 1122, March 24, on which day there was a lunar eclipse. The week-day was, however, Friday.

The record, containing a eulogy of Kāḷa-gāvuṇḍa and Kāḷi-seṭṭi, states that the latter built a temple of Śiva at Kāgenele, had tanks dug, established feeding houses, water sheds and gardens. It further records the gift of land made by Kāḷa-gāvuṇḍa, to the temple of god Brahmēśvara, built by Kāḷi-seṭṭi, and for the feeding of ascetics. The gift was entrusted to Sivaśakti-Paṇḍita. Also gifts of money made by the guild of Tambuligas, the Ugura Three-hundred and others are recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhuvē . svasti samastabhu
© vanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājadhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābhara
ṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire ©
v® © daḷitāṁbhōjasarōvarapratatiyiṁdudyānasaṁdōhadiṁ (.) phaḷabhārānata ramyaśāḷivanadiṁ nīḷābjasuṣṣaṁḍasaṁ
kuḷadiṁ suttida pūrṇnavāriparikhāvibhrājiyiṁ dīrgghikāvaḷiyiṁ kaṇgesediṁtu kāgenele saśyānīkadiṁdo
ppuguṁ © baḷasida kōṭe śūdrara nikētanadiṁ gaṇikānivāṭasaṁkuḷada viḷāsadiṁ dvijanivāsakadaṁbakadiṁ vaṇiggṛhāvaḷiyinu
dāttadēvabhavanaṁgaḷa tiṁtiṇiyiṁde śōbhayaṁ taḷedu podaḷdu kāgenele saṁtatamiṁtese doppi tōṟuguṁ mattavalliṁ
baḷikke kāḷagāvuṁḍana vṛttāṁtameṁteṁdaḍe © baḷavadvikramadhātrītaḷavarttitakīrtti barmmagāvuṁḍaṁgaṁ kaḷakaṇṭhīrave kuvaḷaya
daḷākṣi sāntavege puṭṭi kāḷimaneseda © va © Antusamastajagajjanavinutaguṇamaṇivibhū ṣaṇaṁ Ammanagaṁdhavāraṇaṁ ripuma
danivāraṇaṁ vairinārāyaṇanenisida kāḷagāvuṁḍana pratāpameṁteṁdaḍe © śaraṇāyūtara neydebāhubaladiṁ kaikoṁḍu
piṁtikki saṁgaradoḷ baṁdidirāṁtu niṁdaripusēnācakramaṁ koṁdu bērppara bērppa rtthiyanittu nirmmaḷayaśaśś®kāṁtanādaṁ vasuṁdhare
yoḷmattina mūnavarddoreye pēḷ śrīkāḷagāvuṁḍanoḷ © bhaṁḍaṇadalli nettaruge poyva miduḷkaruḷurmme bīḷva perggaṁḍamu
ruḷva palpaṟiva kai muṟivelkaḍikhaṁḍamappameyi muṁḍadamēle muṁḍamire vikramanaṭṭe gaḷaṭṭe kāḷagāvuṁḍanaḍurttu ta
ḷtiṟidu gelvanidirccida vairisainyamaṁ © madavatvikramasaṁbhṛtaṁ parasurāmādhīśanoḷ baṁdu tāgida bhūpaṁge narāstra pāśu
patamippantirddapaṁ nāḍe dārada vidviṣṭanṛpaṁge rāmasaramippaṁtirddapaṁ sārddu pakka doḷāṁtirddahitaṁge kaṭṭidalagippantirdda
paṁ kāḷamaṁ © vinayāṁbhōnidhi kaṭṭarmminakaṇi tējaśvi parasurāmacamūnāthana kaṭṭidalagu kāḷamananavarataṁ bērppavaṁ
ge bērppu danīvaṁ © pratipāḷisuvaṁ grāmadoḷatiśayamenisirppa dharmmamaṁ diṭadiṁda nṛtavākyaṁ bhuvanadoḷēṁ kṛMistake for khu
tapuṇyaṁ kāḷanaṁtu nōṁtaruvoḷare . va . mattavalliṁ tadanantaraṁ kāḷiseṭṭiyānvayāvatā rameṁteṁdaḍe . śīḷō
tkarayute sucarite lōḷāyatanētre celveyarasaveyeṁbī bālegamā sāṁtaṁge guṇā layamene puṭṭi siṁganīgaḷnegaḻdaṁ .
Ā vibhusiṁgaṁ sakaḷakaḷāvidanenisiṟdu matte guṇavati lāvaṇyāvati lakṣmīvati rūpāvati muddaveya maduveyādiṁ baḷika .
pesara banavāsedēśadoḷaśadaḷamesedirppa kāgeneleyoḷvibhrajisutire muddavegaṁ siṁgi seṭṭagaṁ puṭṭi kāḷiseṭṭi kṛtārtthaṁ .
Ā kāḷiseṭṭi mānavalōkāgraṇi saccaritranartthige kalpānōkahanamaḷōccayaśaśś® kāṁtāramaṇanenisidaṁ vasumatiyoḷ .
Ātana vadhu kaṁcave saccāturyye patibrateguṇavatiyenisi dharitrītaḷadoḷeyde raṁjisuvāta takīrttiyane taḷedu sogayi
sutiddaḷ . Aḷikuḷakuṁtaḷe ghanakuce kaḷakaṇThe caṁdravadane latākōmaḷe kuḷiśadasane kuvaḷayadaḷākṣi kaṁcaveya doregesatiyarddoBefore ca two letters seem to have been written and then scored off.
reye . kāṁcanamaṁ nijapatiyaṁ vaṁcisi baiytiḍuva peṁḍiraṁ meccaḷtānuṁ ciṁtāmaṇi yavolī kaṁcave kuḍu
tirppaḷēnanārbbēḍidaḍaṁ . Ātana tammaṁ cāruvinītaṁ śuci satyavaṁtanamaḷa ca cāturyyasamanvitanatinītividaṁ
dhareyoḷiṁtu mādhavanesedaṁ . va . Antu samantātiśayacarita nayavinayavitaraṇaguṇa yutanenisida kā
ḷiseṭṭi tanage diśādhavaḷitamappakīrttiyaṁ svāyattaṁ māḍaleṁdu dharmmaprāraṁbha cittanāgi . surapatiyaritu
vimānada doreyene lōkōttamamene kautukamane vistaritamane kāgeneleyoḷviracisidaṁ kāḷiseṭṭiśivamaṁdira
maṁ . Idu mērūrvvīrdhdhravo vēṇidu hirmmyācaḷamō peṁpiniṁ pēḷcelvādudu kanakakaḷaśaśōbhāspadanā
nākūṭakētuviṁ śivagēhaṁ . dānanidhi kuśaḷakaḷānidhi satyanidhi cāruguṇanidhi vinayāṁ
bhōnidhi śaucanidhiyenisi mānavajagadoḷage kāḷiseṭṭi kṛtārtthaṁ . Aṁnamanikkuvanavariva reṁnade taṇivaṁne
gaṁ satatameṁdaḍudārōṁnatiyoḷnarariṁnuṁ muṁnīgaḷkāḷaseṭṭiyaṁ pōltaparē . Agaḷisi kūḍe kaṭṭisi
daniṁtu taṭākamaniṭṭanalligallige sale satramaṁ banamaniṁtaṟavaṇṭageyaṁ niraṁtaraṁ sogayise dēvatā
gṛhamaniṁtu vinirmmisidaṁ podaḷda kīrttige neleyappinaṁ jagadoḷēṁ kṛtapuṇyanō seṭṭikāḷamaṁ . svasti śrī
maccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 47 neya śubhakṛtsaṁvatsarada caitreda puṇname sōma vāradaṁdina sōma
grahaṇa vyatīpātaparvvanimittavāgi kāgeneleyalu kāḷiseṭṭi māḍisida brahmēśvara dēvara nivēdya
kkaṁ dēvālyada khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ tapōdhanarāhāradānakkaṁ svasti śrīmanmahāprabhu kāḷegā
vuṁḍaṁ . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhi(ṁ) śīḷasaṁpaṁnara
ppa śrīmatu śivaśaktipaṁḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi Ūriṁ teṁkalu kāḷayageṟeya baḍagaṇa
kōḍiya keḷagaṇa modalagaḻdekamma 25 Alliṁpattida berddalu kamma 60 maṁ sarvva namaśyamāgi koṭṭa . svastyanēkaguṇa
gaṇāḷankṛtaviśēṣōṁnatarappa śrīmattaṁbuligasāsirvvaruṁ gātrakke pāgavaṁ koṭṭaru Ūra taṁbuligaru gātrakke paṇa
vaṁ koṭṭaru Uguramūnūrvvaru lakhkhakke vīsamaṁ koṭṭaru Aynūṟanālvaruṁ Arevāgamaṁ koṭṭaru Ūra Eppadiṁba
ruṁ haḷḷiya Eppadiṁbaruṁ kūḍi mēṁṭivaḷḷamaṁ koṭṭaru nakharaṁgaḷsaṭṭuga bhattamaṁ telligaru naṁdādīvigege soṁṭige
yeṁṇeyaṁ koṭṭaru sippigaruṁ Oṟegoḻaguṁ naṁdādīvigege bāgilalu pāgavaṁ koṭṭaru konekāṟaruṁ gaḷege pā
gavaṁ koṭṭaru baṇaṁjigarainūrvvaruṁ Aḍakeya kēṟiṁge vīsamaṁ koṭṭaru(ṁ) davasāyada hēṟiṁge vommāna bhattavaṁ ko
ṭṭaru śrīmaddaṁḍanāyakaṁ vaḍḍarāvuḷadadhiṣṭhāyakaṁ mallarasaru vaḍḍarāvuḷada suṁka doḷage voṁdulakhkhaḍa
keya suṁkamaṁ dēvara nivēdyakke koṭṭaru vaḍḍarāvuḷada davasāyada perggaḍe subbaṇayyaṁ tammokkaldeṟevo
ḷage voṁdakkaldeṟeyaṁ koḷavīsasahitaṁ koṭṭaru . priyadiṁdī dharmmamaṁ kādavanipa tatigakuṁ kuru
kṣētradal gangeyoḷaṁ vēdāḍhyaviprāḷige kavilegaḷaṁ poṁgaḷaṁ koṭṭa puṇyaṁ niyataṁ sa(r)ddharmmamaṁ rakṣisa
de keḍisidaṁgakkumā tīrtthadaldivyayatibrātadvijānīkamananiba(ṁ)rumaṁ koṁda dōśapratānaṁ .
Aḷidavanidanekkōṭiyanaḷidaṁ tīrtthaṁgaḷenutuvanitumanōrantaḷidaṁ pasuvuṁ pārvvaranaḷidaṁ mēyaḷidanātanajaguji
giḷida . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāḥ śaṣṭhivarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmi .
Digital edition of SII 18.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
